description: Configure offline payment methods for B2B wholesale orders using the admin credentials admin/Admin1234!. Enable 'Bank Transfer Payment' with the title 'Wire Transfer / ACH', sort order 10, and instructions: "Bank: First Example Bank, Routing: 021000021, Account: 9876543210. Please include your Order Number in the wire reference." Additionally, enable 'Check / Money Order' with the title 'Corporate Check', sort order 20, payable to 'TechCorp Solutions', and mailing address '123 Tech Blvd, San Francisco, CA 94107'.
